source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 200-L tank initially contains water at 100 kPa and a quality of 1%. Heat is transferred to the water, thereby raising its pressure and temperature. At a pressure of 2 MPa, a safety valve opens and saturated vapor at 2 MPa flows out. The process continues, maintaining 2 MPa inside until the quality in the tank is 90%, then stops. Determine the total heat transfer.
